Entries.spring_Fri4_1:
I thought it was time I gave you something for our chats and your gifts.#$b
								  #I like to make jelly with the extra cherries from the tree outside.#$b#Here's my latest jar, just for you.$h [ 344 ]
Entries.spring_Fri6_2: You run around a lot, but it's nice to catch up sometimes.$h#$b#Here, we have plenty of jelly from the cherry tree. [ 344 ]
Entries.summer_Mon4_1:
You know, the tree out front grows lots of cherries. We have some left over in the fridge that I'm slowly making into jelly.#$b
								  #I can't cook them all down, but I know you'd enjoy some. [ 638 ]#$b
								  #I thought I'd share them with someone other than Lewis or Gus for once.
Entries.summer_Mon6_2:
I still have plenty of cherries from our tree.#$e
								  #Since you're so inquisitive, why don't you take some? It'd be a shame to let them go to waste. [ 638 ]
Entries.spring_Mon:
$1 evelynsTree#I'm sure a farmer would be interested in this: the tree outside our house is a cherry tree old as me.#$b
							   #At least, that's what we think. It's been there since before I can remember.#$b
							   #And as a little girl, I took that sort of thing for granted.#$b
							   #Until I had its cherries, that is.#$b
							   #At first, they were too tart for a young child like myself. But they were so sweet I kept coming back.#$b
							   #Then I wouldn't stop fawning over it come the new year.$k
							   #$e#The old cherry tree is fruiting again.
							   #$e#It's about time to collect some again.
Entries.spring_Fri6_inlaw_Alex:
It's nice to see you and Alex together.#$b
										   #As a gift for you two, I have some of his favorite jelly. [ 344 ]

Entries.spring_Sat4:
It's cherry picking day for me.
								#$e#I like to shake the high branches with my gridball.$u
							    #$e#If it gets stuck, I just shake the low branches until the cherries *and* the ball fall out.

Entries.spring_1_2: Now that the leaves are budding, the cherries need picking.#$e#Alex usually collects it all. Maybe an adept farmer like yourself could lend a hand.
Entries.spring_1_2_inlaw_Alex: It's cherry season again.#$b#Maybe you could help Alex collect them this year.
Entries.spring_Thu8: There's so many berries to go around, I'm getting sick of cherries.#$b#Not to say I don't miss them when they're all gone.$h
Entries.summer_4: I already miss looking outside at the cherry blossoms falling.$s
